title: Front Office Manager - Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates - Multiple Openings
company: Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Kanpur. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates:
Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in OTA Management
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in HACCP
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Crisis Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Menzies Aviation India Asia Pacific Associates!
